The text discusses a research paper titled "Combating Phishing in Kenya: A Supervised Learning Model for Enhanced Email Security in Kenyan Financial Institutions". The paper proposes an AI-based solution to combat phishing attacks, which are a significant cybersecurity issue in Kenya's financial sector.

The attack mechanism involves sending phishing emails that appear to be from legitimate sources such as banks, financial institutions, or government agencies. These emails often contain malware that infects devices upon opening and allows attackers to steal sensitive information or take control of the device. Techniques
